strengths: Solid distributed-systems background with production exposure to high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby).
Recent hands-on work with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) frameworks at re:cinq, showing early relevance to the role's technical domain.
Fintech-adjacent experience at RIDE Capital applying disciplined engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) in a regulated investment context.
concerns: No demonstrated engineering leadership or team management at any scale; entire career history is individual contributor or staff-level execution, with no record of hiring, growing, or structuring engineering organizations.

AI and agentic systems experience is nascent (started April 2025) and tooling-level (MCP generators, developer frameworks), not production multi-agent systems with financial or operational consequences.

No executive or board-facing experience; the role requires roadmap communication to investors and leadership, organizational governance, and strategic vendor/outsourcing management — none of which appear in the resume.
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically capable full-stack and backend engineer with meaningful experience in high-throughput distributed systems and an emerging interest in agentic AI tooling, but the profile does not meet the bar for a CTO role at this stage: there is no evidence of managing engineering teams, scaling organizations, setting architectural strategy across a company, or operating production AI systems with financial stakes — all of which are hard requirements for this executive position.
